title: Analytics - Device Connected
scenario: Verify that the device connection success event is logged with default elements (graph, events in last 30 min, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version/build/environment) and additional tracked fields (Device PID, Device Serial), and that event counts update after a few hours.
steps: Open the app and connect a device successfully.
Wait a few hours for event counts to update.
Navigate to the event logs section.
Locate the event logged for the device connection.
Verify the event includes default elements: graph, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
Check that the event includes additional tracked fields: Device PID and Device Serial.
expected: The event is logged with all default elements (graph, events in last 30 min, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment) and additional fields (Device PID, Device Serial). Event counts are updated after a few hours.
